finding: Stacking guard queried the caller-overridable data-testid instead of the stable data-slot=layout-drawer marker; an overridden testid defeats the guard
Desktop auth barrel shadow was incomplete (missing useAuthStore vs core barrel) with a false rationale comment — a latent desktop-only parity trap

UIOverrides key extraction used a non-greedy }-terminated regex that truncates multi-line object-typed seam values and captures nested keys; first multi-prop seam would false-fail check:override-registry
isHigherLayerPresent uses strict z>thisZ while all drawers default to z-50, so two DEFAULT-z stacked drawers aren't guarded
status: rejected: matches core Drawer's identical contract — a stacked drawer is expected to pass an elevated zIndex (see the overlay zIndex-1 elevation path); changing to >= would falsely guard same-z siblings

finding: Stale doc ref to desktop-base/overrides.tsx (now overrides/hardware-monitor.tsx)

status: rejected: pre-existing (identical to the original plugin), build-time, developer-controlled import graph; no new attack surface; both auditors confirmed no .desktop web-bundle leak

finding: insertAugmentation idempotency check matches the key string anywhere in the file; no-import file splices at line 0
status: rejected: advisory human-reviewed codemod path; low impact, output always reviewed

finding: classifyDivergence Set-membership diff ignores duplicate-line count deltas
status: rejected: advisory element-level-vs-structural hint only, non-gating

finding: collectTestids rank formula could invert tier-1 vs tier-2 precedence IF one path had BOTH a desktop-tree shadow AND a core .desktop shadow
status: rejected: lint-only, and that dual-shadow file combination does not occur (a path is one OR the other); documented corner

finding: Reviewed: glob auto-discovery warns (not throws) on a missing register() export; resolveOverride returns undefined cleanly
status: rejected: no issue — clean error handling

finding: Reviewed: registerDesktopOverrides runs synchronously pre-render (after loadDesktopModules, before createRoot); no seam read before registration; last-write-wins Map, no HMR dup
Reviewed: all three title paths give exactly one Radix accessible name (string→Title asChild; node→sr-only Title; null→sr-only fallback)
Reviewed: registry is populated once at boot, read at render; no async mutation, no cross-thread access
Reviewed: the hardware::monitor permission gate is OUTSIDE the <Seam>, so the desktop override also only renders when permitted; no new permission introduced
Reviewed: unit tests exercise real register/resolve/seam/resolver/codemod/manifest paths, not cosmetic assertions; 30 assertions
Reviewed: user-facing copy is dev docs + a Monitor button label (unchanged); no hardcoded UI strings needing i18n added
